scripts.test:critical: NODE_ENV=test PODIO_CLIENT_ID=test PODIO_CLIENT_SECRET=test PODIO_USERNAME=test PODIO_PASSWORD=test INTERNAL_API_SECRET=test BUYER_WEBHOOK_SECRET=test OPS_DASHBOARD_SECRET=test APP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 node --import ./tests/register-aliases.mjs --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/critical/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:critical
